title: The Revolution of SocialMedia
body:
Via: [Social Media Revolution](http://sicrono.com/internet/video-social-media-revolution/)

-   Social Networks have surpassed pornography as the top activity on the web.
-   80% of companies use social media in their hiring process (of these, 95% use LinkedIn).
-   Facebook has achieved more than 200 million users in just 3 years.
-   60 million status updates daily on Facebook.
-   In the UK, 50% of mobile Internet traffic is on Facebook.
-   Twitter has as many users as the entire population of Ireland or Sweden.
-   The second largest search engine in the world is YouTube.
-   1 billion iPhone app downloads in just 9 months.

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lFZ0z5Fm-Ng http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sIFYPQjYhv8
